page_header.label: ECOSYSTEM
page_header.title: Partners & Integrations
page_header.description: The growing ZKIRA Pay ecosystem. Compatible wallets, future integrations, and partnership opportunities.

sections.label: SUPPORTED WALLETS
sections.title: Compatible Wallets
sections.subtitle: ZKIRA Pay works seamlessly with all major Solana wallets through the Wallet Adapter standard.

items.title: Phantom
items.description: The most popular Solana wallet with browser extension and mobile app support. Full compatibility with ZKIRA Pay stealth addresses.

items.title: Solflare
items.description: Feature-rich Solana wallet with advanced portfolio tracking and staking capabilities. Seamless integration with ZKIRA payment links.

items.title: Backpack
items.description: Next-generation wallet with social features and multi-chain support. Full compatibility with ZKIRA Pay's stealth addressing.

sections.label: FUTURE INTEGRATIONS
sections.title: Coming Soon
sections.subtitle: Planned integrations with major DeFi protocols, DEXs, and Solana ecosystem partners.

items.title: DEX Integration
items.description: Integration with major Solana DEXs for private swapping and trading. Confidential limit orders and stealth trading capabilities.

items.title: DeFi Protocols
items.description: Private lending, borrowing, and yield farming through stealth addresses. Maintain privacy while participating in DeFi ecosystems.

items.title: Payment Gateways
items.description: Merchant integration with e-commerce platforms. Accept private payments through Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom implementations.

sections.label: BUILT ON SOLANA
sections.title: Solana Ecosystem
sections.subtitle: ZKIRA Pay leverages Solana's high-performance blockchain for fast, low-cost confidential payments.

items.title: High Performance
items.description: 65,000 transactions per second with sub-second finality. ZKIRA payments confirm almost instantly.

items.title: Low Cost
items.description: Transaction fees under $0.01. Create and claim payments without worrying about gas costs.

items.title: Token-2022 Support
items.description: Future integration with Solana's Token-2022 program for native confidential transfer extensions.

items.title: Integrate with ZKIRA
items.description: Add confidential payments to your application with our TypeScript SDK, React widgets, and REST API. Complete integration in minutes.

items.title: Become a Partner
items.description: Partner with ZKIRA Pay to bring confidential payments to your ecosystem. Strategic partnerships and technical collaborations welcome.

sections.title: Start building today
sections.description: Join the growing ZKIRA Pay ecosystem. Integrate confidential payments, partner with us, or contribute to our open source development.
